text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: In this corner is the ideal of Japanese beauty and might! The unwavering wrestler, Graaaass Wonderrr!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ¡¿Qué?! Spe, did you eat something funny?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe… And in this corner, she'll show you that Hokkaido spirit! It's the wrestler with guts of steel, Speciaaaal Weeek!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And finally, she's here! The one to fear! The 
world's strongest! The raging tempest, the 
lightspeed storm of a masked wrestler!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Time to celebrate, El! We've got a party 
all set up for you in the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sei and King are already waiting for us there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go, let's go! Let's go right nooow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
…Today, just for today, I think I can let 
a couple tears slide while the mask is on.
